game_info.title: Shovel Knight: Treasure Quest
game_info.concept:
Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove is the complete Shovel Knight collection, containing all 5 games in the epic saga! Dig, blast, slash, and bash your way through a fantastical, 8-bit inspired world of pixel-perfect platforming, memorable characters, and world-class action-adventure gameplay.
Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove is the full and complete edition of Shovel Knight, a sweeping classic action-adventure game series with awesome gameplay, memorable characters, and an 8-bit retro aesthetic! Run, jump, and battle as Shovel Knight, wielder of the Shovel Blade, in a quest for his lost beloved. Take down the nefarious knights of the Order of No Quarter and confront their menacing leader, The Enchantress.

But that’s not everything! Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove also features four additional games all unto themselves! Take control of Plague Knight, Specter Knight, and King Knight on adventures of their own or battle each other in a local four player Showdown. Together, they form a grand and sweeping saga!

With Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove, you get it all. Play with a friend in Shovel of Hope's cooperative campaign, test your mettle in full-featured challenge modes, battle together in Showdown, and change the game with Body Swap mode. Uphold the virtues of Shovelry, earn relics and riches, and discover the true meaning of shovel justice!

Includes:


Shovel Knight: Shovel of Hope – Steel your Shovel Blade and start digging through the adventure that started it all! Jump, battle foes, and discover treasures as you quest to defeat the Order of No Quarter and their vile leader, The Enchantress.

Shovel Knight: Plague of Shadows – Prime your potions and become the maniacal alchemist Plague Knight in his adventure to brew the ultimate potion! Combine bomb parts to create custom loadouts. Discover new items, areas, bosses, and maybe even a bubbling romance.

Shovel Knight: Specter of Torment – Summon your scythe in the prequel to Shovel Knight! Take control of Specter Knight to dash through levels completely redesigned around his unique style of play. Climb walls, master a new arsenal of weapons, and slash your foes to ribbons with deathly precision. Become the reaper, discover your tragic past, and recruit the Order of No Quarter!

Shovel Knight: King of Cards - Step into the gilded boots of King Knight in the biggest and most regal Shovel Knight game of them all! Leap, Shoulder Bash, gather new subjects, and strategize your way through this prequel in your quest to become King of Cards!

Shovel Knight Showdown - Duel with up to 4 players locally and scramble after gems, or take control of your favorite character and dig into Story Mode! Master every move, explore a vast array of items and locales, and discover new revelations in this platform fighting game.

Features:

  • Yacht Club Games' beautifully authentic style bridges the gap between yesterday and today. Design, art, and audio hearken back to the days of 8-bit.
  • The systems of today also give Shovel Knight modern touches: detailed animation, multilayered parallax backgrounds, and novel game design.
  • Leap over gaps! Duel with foes! Uncover treasure! Find Secrets! Upgrade! Shovel Knight is simple to learn and play, but the challenge lies everywhere.
  • Multiple awesome soundtracks by Jake "Virt" Kaufman with additional songs by Manami Matsumae!
  • Amass riches to upgrade your armor and weapons.
  • Detailed, living background art and animation! Big, beautiful pixels!
  • Lovable characters and treacherous bosses!
    Balanced gameplay is a warm welcome to newcomers, and an old embrace for experts.
  • A light touch to narrative with humor, levity, and heart.
  • Relive the adventure and uncover all of the world's secrets with New Game+!
  • Challenge Mode - Up the ante in every imaginable way with over 100 full-featured challenges.
  • Body Swap - Did you ever wish Shovel Knight was a lady, or Shield Knight was a guy? Well, now you can designate character genders however you like, with brand new designs for all of the main characters in Shovel of Hope!
  • Co-op! – Grab a friend and play through Shovel of Hope as a fully cooperative adventure! Or uncover Story Mode together in Showdown!
game_info.description: Embark on a pixel-perfect platforming adventure as the brave Shovel Knight! Dig through mystical ruins, collect glittering treasure gems, and defeat monstrous enemies with your trusty Shovel Blade. Navigate treacherous platforms, discover hidden riches, and prove your worth as the wielder of Shovelry! Collect all the gems to unlock the final challenge and restore peace to the realm.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left: Move left
Arrow Right: Move right
Arrow Down: Dig downward while in air (Shovel Drop attack)
Space: Jump (Press again in air for double jump)
Z: Attack with Shovel Blade
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game
ENTER: Start game from title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and platforming mechanics. Verifies that the player can navigate platforms, perform jumps, and interact with the environment without getting stuck or falling through platforms.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move left and right across all platforms, perform single and double jumps to reach higher platforms. Test edge detection by walking to platform edges. Attempt shovel drop attacks on various surfaces.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates all platforms without clipping errors. Jumps execute smoothly with proper physics. Shovel drop attack triggers correctly when airborne and pressing down. No collision detection failures occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing complete game win condition through optimal gem collection strategy. Validates that collecting all gems triggers the win state and that the game properly tracks progress.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implement pathfinding algorithm to locate and collect all gems efficiently. Prioritize nearest gems first, using jumps and movement to navigate optimally. Attack enemies blocking gem collection paths. Ensure all gems are collected within reasonable time.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: AI successfully collects all gems by navigating platforms and avoiding/defeating enemies. Upon collecting the final gem, game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score accurately reflects all collected gems and defeated enemies.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing combat system including melee attacks and shovel drop mechanics. Verifies damage dealing, enemy defeat conditions, and player vulnerability.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Engage enemies using both horizontal shovel attacks (Z key) and aerial shovel drop attacks (Down arrow while airborne). Test attack hitboxes and damage application. Allow enemies to attack player to verify damage reception and health system.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Attacks successfully damage and defeat enemies. Shovel drop bounces player upward upon hitting enemy. Health decreases when taking damage. Game over triggers at zero health. Combat feels responsive and satisfying.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing edge cases and boundary conditions including screen edges, platform boundaries, and collision corner cases.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Deliberately navigate to screen boundaries and test movement constraints. Jump into corners where platforms meet. Test rapid direction changes and simultaneous input combinations. Attempt to exploit collision detection with rapid movements.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player cannot move beyond screen boundaries. No clipping through platforms occurs regardless of approach angle or speed. Rapid inputs are handled gracefully without breaking game state. Corner collisions behave predictably.
TEST_4.description: Testing edge cases and boundary conditions including screen edges, platform boundaries, and collision corner cases.
TEST_4.strategy: Deliberately navigate to screen boundaries and test movement constraints. Jump into corners where platforms meet. Test rapid direction changes and simultaneous input combinations. Attempt to exploit collision detection with rapid movements.
TEST_4.expected: Player cannot move beyond screen boundaries. No clipping through platforms occurs regardless of approach angle or speed. Rapid inputs are handled gracefully without breaking game state. Corner collisions behave predictably.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing particle effects, visual feedback, and animation systems. Ensures all visual elements render correctly and enhance game feel.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Trigger all particle-generating events: collecting gems, attacking enemies, taking damage, shovel dropping, and landing on platforms. Observe animation state transitions during movement, jumping, and attacking.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Particle effects appear for all appropriate actions without performance degradation. Animations transition smoothly between states. Visual feedback clearly communicates game events to player. No visual artifacts or rendering errors occur.
TEST_5.description: Testing particle effects, visual feedback, and animation systems. Ensures all visual elements render correctly and enhance game feel.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing enemy AI behavior patterns including patrol routes, aggro mechanics, and attack patterns. Validates that enemies provide appropriate challenge.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Observe enemy behavior from various distances. Enter and exit enemy detection ranges. Test enemy collision with platforms and screen boundaries. Verify enemies cannot walk off platforms inappropriately.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Enemies patrol platforms without falling off. Detection range triggers pursuit behavior. Enemies attack when player is in range. AI behaves predictably and fairly, providing challenge without being unfair.
TEST_6.description: Testing enemy AI behavior patterns including patrol routes, aggro mechanics, and attack patterns. Validates that enemies provide appropriate challenge.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing game phase transitions and state management. Ensures proper flow between START, PLAYING, PAUSED, and GAME_OVER states.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Start game with ENTER, immediately pause with ESC, resume with ESC. Die deliberately to trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE. Collect all gems for GAME_OVER_WIN. Press R to restart from each end state.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: All phase transitions occur correctly. Pause freezes gameplay but maintains state. Game over screens display appropriate information. Restart properly resets all game state. No state corruption occurs during transitions.
TEST_7.description: Testing game phase transitions and state management. Ensures proper flow between START, PLAYING, PAUSED, and GAME_OVER states.
TEST_7.strategy: Start game with ENTER, immediately pause with ESC, resume with ESC. Die deliberately to trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE. Collect all gems for GAME_OVER_WIN. Press R to restart from each end state.
TEST_7.expected: All phase transitions occur correctly. Pause freezes gameplay but maintains state. Game over screens display appropriate information. Restart properly resets all game state. No state corruption occurs during transitions.
